title: Build the attribution/NOTICE artifact
description: Assemble a complete THIRD-PARTY notice from collected copyright lines and license texts, then verify completeness.
body: Steps: 1. Enumerate every component that ships in the artifact. 2. Extract each component's copyright statement and full license text. 3. Concatenate them into a NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES file keyed by component and version. 4. For Apache-2.0 components, also carry any upstream NOTICE file contents verbatim. 5. Diff the result against the committed file in CI. Rollback point: before replacing the committed notice. Validation: regenerating yields no diff, and every attribution-requiring component appears with its copyright and license text.
